About

Product-minded engineer with backend strength

I work across frontend, backend, and deployment with strongest focus on Java backend systems, full-stack applications, and production quality.

⚙️

Backend First

Java Spring Boot, clean architecture, REST APIs, tests, PostgreSQL, and Docker-ready deployments.

🖥️

Full-Stack

Next.js, Node.js, full database design, auth, payments, and real-time features end-to-end.

🔧

Repo Modernization

Taking existing GitHub projects and making them production-ready: debugging, UI/UX, tests, Docker.

How I work

  • I prioritize measurable outcomes: faster pages, fewer bugs, stronger architecture, better UX.
  • I build with documentation, test coverage, and deployability in mind from the start.
  • I take ownership of entire features, not just isolated tasks.
  • I continuously grow my public GitHub profile with real projects.
